├─ Channel: Concessa Obvius (UCa_mZVVqV5Aq48a0MnIjS-w)
├─ Cron Job ID: 114e5c6d-ac8b-47ca-a695-79ac31b5c076
├─ Status: ✓ OPERATIONAL
├─ Schedule: Every 30 minutes (1800 seconds)
└─ Last Run: 2026-04-20 18:02:55 UTC

📊 COMMENTS PROCESSED
├─ Total Processed: 283
├─ Processing Window: Ongoing since cron job activation
├─ Data Format: JSONL (JSON Lines)
└─ Log Location: ~/.cache/youtube-comments.jsonl

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ Category         │ Count │ % of Total │ Action              │
├──────────────────┼───────┼────────────┼─────────────────────┤
│ Questions (Cat 1)│  79   │ 27.9%      │ Auto-respond        │
│ Praise (Cat 2)   │  79   │ 27.9%      │ Auto-respond        │

│ Sales (Cat 4)    │  32   │ 11.3%      │ Flag for review     │
│ Other            │  16   │  5.7%      │ Logged              │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

✅ AUTO-RESPONSES SENT
├─ Total Auto-Responses: 127
│  ├─ Questions Template: "Thanks for asking! I'll reach out with more info soon."
│  └─ Praise Template: "This means the world! 💕 Thanks for being part of the community"
├─ Response Rate: 44.9% of total comments
└─ Status: Fully operational

🚩 FLAGGED FOR REVIEW
├─ Total Flagged: 32 comments
├─ Category: Sales & Partnership Inquiries
├─ Flag Rate: 11.3% of total
├─ Location: Separate flagged log
└─ Status: Awaiting manual review at your convenience

🗑️ SPAM FILTERED
├─ Spam Comments Detected: 64
├─ Detection Rate: 22.6%
├─ Keywords: crypto, bitcoin, mlm, forex, "dm me", "click here"
├─ Action: Logged (no auto-response)
└─ Status: Contained and documented

🔧 SYSTEM CONFIGURATION
├─ LaunchAgent: com.openclaw.youtube-comment-monitor
├─ Execution Interval: 30 minutes (1800 seconds)
├─ Script Path: ~/.cache/youtube-comment-monitor-cron.sh
├─ Python Runtime: google-api-python-client (via YouTube Data API)
├─ Logging: Enabled (stdout/stderr to separate log files)
└─ Auto-Start: Yes (RunAtLoad=true)

📁 DATA FILES & LOCATIONS
├─ Main Log: ~/.cache/youtube-comments.jsonl
│  └─ Format: {timestamp, comment_id, commenter, text, category, response_status}
├─ Report: ~/.cache/youtube-comments-report.txt
├─ State: ~/.cache/youtube-comment-state.json
├─ Execution Log: ~/.cache/youtube-comment-monitor-cron.log
└─ Flagged Log: ~/.cache/youtube-comments-flagged.jsonl (if exists)

🎯 NEXT STEPS
1. ✓ Monitor runs automatically every 30 minutes
2. ✓ Questions & Praise get instant auto-responses
3. ✓ Sales inquiries flagged for your personal review
4. ✓ All data logged to JSONL for analysis/export

📋 HOW TO USE
├─ View live log: tail -f ~/.cache/youtube-comments.jsonl
├─ Generate report: cat ~/.cache/youtube-comments-report.txt
├─ Manually trigger: python3 ~/.cache/youtube-comment-monitor.py
└─ Stop monitor: launchctl stop com.openclaw.youtube-comment-monitor

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
CRON JOB RUNNING: Monitor is active and will continue processing every 30 min
